name: D/D Lance Soldier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ランス・ソルジャー
desc: You can target 1 "D/D" monster you control; increase its Level by up to the number of "Dark Contract" cards in your field and GY. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Dark Contract" card you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "D/D Lance Soldier" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 "D/D" monster you control; increase its Level by up to the number of "Dark Contract" cards in your field and GY. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Dark Contract" card you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "D/D Lance Soldier" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 "D/D" monster you control; increase its Level by up to the number of "Dark Contract" cards in your field and GY. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Dark Contract" card you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "D/D Lance Soldier" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
